# seqera_pipeline_versions (Data Source)

List versions of a Seqera Platform pipeline.

Wraps `GET /pipelines/{pipelineId}/versions`. Use to discover `version_id`s
for `seqera_pipeline_version`, or to fan a launchpad over multiple revisions.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pipeline_id` (Number) Pipeline numeric identifier.
- `workspace_id` (Number) Workspace numeric identifier.

### Optional

- `is_published` (Boolean) Filter by publish status. Set to true for published versions only, false for drafts only. Omit to return both. Forwarded to the platform as the ?isPublished query parameter.

### Read-Only

- `versions` (Attributes List) Pipeline versions, in the order returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--versions))

<a id="nestedatt--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `versions`

Read-Only:

- `creator_avatar_url` (String) Avatar URL of the version creator.
- `creator_first_name` (String) First name of the version creator.
- `creator_last_name` (String) Last name of the version creator.
- `creator_user_id` (Number) Numeric ID of the user who created the version.
- `creator_user_name` (String) Username of the version creator.
- `date_created` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the version was created.
- `hash` (String) Server-side hash of the version's launch configuration.
- `id` (String) Pipeline version string identifier.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this version is the pipeline default.
- `last_updated` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the version was last updated.
- `name` (String) Pipeline version name.
